audit_report.verdict: User concern valid: 8 extension fix commits each included targeted tests (all pass on re-run 06:22 BST). Campaign bootstrap (persona seeder, live-review runner, start-filters module) was used live but largely UNCOMMITTED until this audit.

scenario_pass_audit.downgrade_reason: Marked pass on routing-only but live session timed out (session_status=running) - insufficient MCP completion evidence
scenario_pass_audit.live_verify_2026_07_13: Fix 1-2 pass with build-reload+MCP evidence. Fix 3 partial (Atum already-applied skip not reproduced). Fix 4 blocked (countryRedirect). p0-11 smartapply routing re-confirmed live.

test_runs.command: npm run extension:build-reload && MCP live verify (Indeed Scientist DSQF7 + Atum + Glassdoor US)
test_runs.summary: Extension reloaded v2.25.61; 4 fix areas live-tested via bridge MCP

mcp_steps: npm run extension:build-reload
extension_status (v2.25.61, tokenSet=true)
start_auto_apply indeed Scientist San Jose DSQF7 maxApplications=1
list_tabs -> smartapply tab 1443888950
indeed_tab_message INDEED_APPLY_STATE on smartapply tab -> open=true stepFingerprint=contact-info-module
get_field_inventory -> 4 fields (first name, last name, phone)
read_field_values -> Toby/Claxton filled fill_rate=0.75
live_verify_runs.evidence: smartapply.indeed.com/beta/indeedapply/form/contact-info-module reachable; iframe messaging and field inventory work

mcp_steps: indeed_tab_message INDEED_COLLECT_JOB_CARDS -> 16 jobs, indeedApply=null on cards
INDEED_SELECT_JOB e59feb873fcdffbe (Intuit) -> noIndeedApply external skip
start_auto_apply Scientist queue -> 3+ external skips with auditable reasons, no false card-level skip
live_verify_runs.evidence: External jobs skipped on detail pane with reason 'Job uses external apply, not Indeed Apply'; unmarked cards not false-skipped at collection

mcp_steps: INDEED_COLLECT_JOB_CARDS -> f8f954020280cd41 alreadyApplied=true
start_auto_apply Atum search -> opened Gene Synthesis Research Associate I, did NOT skip as already_applied
list_tabs during Scientist run -> 0 then 1 smartapply tab (no viewjob accumulation)
live_verify_runs.evidence: Card-level alreadyApplied flag detected; Atum re-apply did not skip (regression vs p0-01 claim). Tab hygiene OK during run (1 smartapply). 3 stale aux tabs from prior overnight runs remain.

mcp_steps: navigate_tab glassdoor.com Scientist San Jose search
list_tabs -> redirected to glassdoor.co.uk/Job/index.htm?countryRedirect=true
glassdoor_tab_message GLASSDOOR_COLLECT_JOB_CARDS -> jobs=[]
glassdoor_tab_message GLASSDOOR_PREPARE_JOB_SEARCH -> fail-fast error countryRedirect
start_auto_apply glassdoor Scientist -> completed 0 applied (US session unavailable)
live_verify_runs.evidence: Fail-fast message: 'Glassdoor redirected this search to a regional recommended feed...' Host mismatch .com->.co.uk confirmed. Blocked pending US Glassdoor Chrome session/VPN.

live_verify_runs.fix_label: Indeed already-applied skip with re-apply button visible
mcp_steps: viewjob d1484f00c2ca6382 (Atum Associate Scientist Bioproduction) -> INDEED_WAIT_FOR_JOB_DETAIL alreadyApplied=true
INDEED_OPEN_APPLY on same tab -> alreadyApplied=true, no smartapply navigation
node --test scripts/extension-test/indeed-already-applied-offline.mjs pass (re-apply button + card badge cases)
live_verify_runs.evidence: Regression root cause: readAlreadyAppliedMarker required absence of Apply with Indeed, so post-submit jobs with re-apply CTA were not skipped. Strong applied-badge signals now win; orchestrator propagates alreadyApplied through open/select/apply paths.

fixes_shipped_overnight: 38fa8989 Fix Indeed Apply detection on job cards and job pane
636490b6 Route Indeed Auto Apply through smartapply tab and iframe
68703409 Treat unmarked Indeed job cards as unknown apply type
ee78d898 Open Indeed Apply via smartapply URL when popup blocked
330c0680 Open viewjob page and click Apply when smartapply tab missing
dc02d232 Require matching Glassdoor host for search URL parity
6addace2 Fix Glassdoor card scope and Indeed apply tab hygiene
db1806d1 Fail Glassdoor Auto Apply on country redirect feeds
open_gaps: Glassdoor US Scientist searches geo-redirect to .co.uk countryRedirect - needs US VPN/session (p0-04/p0-05/p0-12 blocked)
Glassdoor UK also serves Recommended Jobs feed instead of search results (p0-07 fail-fast)
Indeed DSQF7 filter surfaces many jobs external on detail pane (p0-01 full queue 0/15 apply)
UK Indeed smartapply phone validation rejects persona formats - blocks submit (p0-06)
MCP start_auto_apply schema stale (missing market/hostTabId) until Cursor MCP reload
Orphan external-apply tabs accumulate during Indeed queue - closeIndeedAuxiliaryTabs partial
p0-03 fit gate not exercised - all jobs skipped external before fit scoring

skip_reasons: external apply only x15 on detail pane
already_applied x1 (Atum Associate Scientist - submitted in p0-11)
scenarios_tested.accuracy_notes: Retest complete 2026-07-13T02:05Z: full DSQF7 queue exhausted with stats.applied=0. Atum (only prior Indeed Apply in list) correctly skipped as already applied. All other 15 cards external on detail pane despite DSQF7 filter. Submit path proven separately in p0-11. FAIL - no submit on fresh job this run.

PASS after 3 fixes: card detection (38fa8989), smartapply tab routing (636490b6), viewjob+Apply-click fallback (330c0680). Atum job: 4 steps, 3 fields drafted, Submit clicked and confirmed. Server-side extension_auto_apply_events id 138 event_type=submitted verified via DB. Note: raw smartapply URLs render empty shell without Apply-button session handoff; expired persona token (401) silently cleared connection mid-run before reseed.

skip_reasons: no_glassdoor_easy_apply x5
scenarios_tested.accuracy_notes: Search URL host correct (.com) after dc02d232 fix, but collected cards are UK software roles (T.H. Baker, Granada Glazing) not Scientist/San Jose. Likely stale-tab recovery or card collector reading wrong DOM. Blocked not pass.

After 6addace2 card scoping returns 0 cards (correct - no job-list-panel on Recommended feed). Root cause: Glassdoor geo-redirects .com to .co.uk countryRedirect. db1806d1 adds fail-fast. Needs US Glassdoor session in Chrome to pass.
